name: Brown Bag Apple Pie#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 cup sugar with 2 tablespoons flour and cinnamon.
2. Add this mixture to the apples and mix well.
3. Place the mixture in an unbaked crust.
4. Cut the margarine into the sugar and flour until very crumbly, then spread over the apples in the pie crust.
5. Add raisins and nuts if desired.
6. Place the pie in a heavy brown paper bag.
7. Seal the bag with paper clips.
8. Bake for 1 hour at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Remove from the bag immediately and place on a rack to cool.
